creator: ronnyforberger@ronnyforberger.de
text:
Hi,

since an upgrade of port www/apache22 to version 2.2.13 the httpd won't launch anymore.

It is ssl related, perhaps when building against a wrong openssl version.

The error_log says: [error] Unable to initialize TLS servername extension callback (incompatible OpenSSL version?)

My installed openssl version, and which version apache22 is built against, is openssl-0.9.8k_5 installed from the freebsd8 binary packages.

I can't build openssl-0.9.8k_5 from ports, since it says the port is broken due to a missing patchset.

Can you help me?

Thanks,
Ronny

How-To-Repeat: /usr/local/etc/rc.d/apache22 start
